title: Industrial Scaling Orchestrator
requirements: Horizontal scaling: Automated provisioning of multiple shard replicas.
Elastic growth: Dynamic shard creation based on market demand forecast (P-13).
Compliance: Maintain Law 151 data residency for all replicated shards.

logic.scaling: Invoke cloud-scaffolding (P-12) for automated container deployment.
logic.routing: Configure regional ingress/services via Kubernetes API.

compliance.isolation: Strict network isolation between regional shard clusters.
compliance.residency: Block replication of Law 151 PII across non-compliant borders.
